question: Chapters
feedback: The text presents a schedule of tasks rather than a list of thesis chapters or sections. It does not identify the main sections that will be covered.

question: Description
feedback: Each item is a task with a deadline; there is no description of the content or purpose of a thesis section. The text does not briefly describe what each part of the thesis will cover.

question: Structure
feedback: Because the text only lists a project timeline, it does not reveal the overall structure or sequence of chapters and sub‑sections that will make up the thesis.
